violations.text: All individual seafood item parasite destruction letters were not available for inspector viewing at the time of inspection. PIC contacted supplier for copies of letters at the time of inspection. Parasite destruction letters are to be maintained on site for inspector viewing upon request. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026

At the time of inspection, the use of Time as a Public Health Control was observed being used for Sushi Rice. Currently, the establishment has not submitted request for use of Time as a Public Health Control for the Sushi Rice. A written request with procedures and record keeping to be submitted to RIDOH CFP Supervisor for review and approval. (Rice observed held out of hot holding was voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection.) Use of Time as a Control guidance and application provided to the PIC at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026

Seafood items are served raw or undercooked. A written consumer advisory (on the menu board) is not provided to the consumer informing them of the significantly increased risk associated with certain vulnerable consumers eating such food in a raw or undercooked form. A consumer advisory is to be added along with an asterisk at each item alerting the customer to the consumer advisory. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026

REDUCED OXYGEN PACKAGED (ROP) FISH was observed stored in refrigeration in its intact packaging at 31 degrees Fahrenheit. ROP fish that bears a label indicating that it is to be kept frozen until time of use shall be removed from the reduced oxygen environment prior to its thawing under refrigeration. Fish items were cut open and removed for proper storage at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026

Utensils were observed stored in a sanitizer bucket between uses. Utensils for food preparation are to be stored in a manor to allow for proper air drying, per sanitizer use instructions, prior to use. Proper storage of utensils discussed with the PIC at the time of Inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Per the PIC, time is needed for a plumber to service the prep sink drain. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2026

The new sink installed used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2025

The back 3 bay sink/prep-room area is lacking a hand-washing sink. A hand washing sink is to be provided for convenient use in the back 3 bay sink/prep-room area prior to approval for Opening. New Violation. Correct By: 10/14/2025
The self-closing mechanism (hinge) to the toilet room door is no longer self-closing the door properly. The self-closing hinge is to be adjusted or replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2025
